grace_period.source_quote: and can be renewed within the Grace Period of 30 days to maintain continuity o f benefits without break

free_look_period.source_quote: The insured person shall be allowed free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document whether electronically or

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the ﬁrst policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident, provided the same are covered.

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the ﬁrst policy with insurer.
pre_existing_disease_waiting_months._reconciliation: Bug #44: authoritative Excl01 PED waiting = 24 months confirmed. No change; reconciled with corrected base.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the ﬁrst policy with us. This exclusion shall not be applicable for claims arising due to an accident.

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 9. Pre-hospitalization Expenses: Medical expenses incurred up to 60 days immediately before the insured person is hospitalized.

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post Hospitalization Expenses: Medical expenses incurred up to 90 days immediately after the insured person is discharged from the hospital.

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Star Health day-care procedures page; 540+ procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 14,000+ network hospitals across India (per official Star Health communications, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: for Insured persons whose age at the time of entry is above 65 years) Each and every claim under the Policy shall be subject to a Copayment of 20% applicable to claim amount admissible and payable as per the terms and conditi

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: Room Rent: Room Rent means the amount charged by a Hospital towards Room and Boarding expenses and shall include the associated medical expenses

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: In case of two year policy, total number of wellness points earned in two year period will be divided by two.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 11. Organ Donor Expenses: In patient hospitalization expenses incurred for organ transplantation from the Donor to the Recipient Insured Person are payable provided the claim for transplantation is payable

restoration_benefit.source_quote: automatic restoration of the Sum Insured once by 100% subject to the following :- 1

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization: Domiciliary hospitalization means medical treatment for an illness/disease/injury which in the normal course would require care and treatment at a hospital but is actually taken while conﬁned at home und

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: Health checkup will not impact Cumulative bonus 18

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility means a facility extended by the insurer to the insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the insured in accordance with the policy terms and conditions, are directly made to the network provider

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: Cumulative bonus calculated at 20% of sum insured for each claim free year subject to a maximum of 100% of the sum insured

geographic_coverage.source_quote: All claims under this policy shall be payable in Indian currency
